gachaLine:
"It's a great honor
for you to befriend me~"

0: Hmm? You've seen my glass empty, why haven't you refilled it yet?
Every morning... I wake up to my own stunning mane~♪
I'm picky about candles... I-I mean scented ones! Don't get me wrong!
Hah... hah? You say I look so good it deserves a photo shoot? Really...?
1: Hey, you there! Capture my dashing looks while you can~♪
Ah, ah! Take your hands off... Ah...♡
2: How dare you! My head is not something you can just touch so casually!
W-wait, what's that pacifier thing in your hand...? Hah... I'm not a baby!
3: Ugh, ah... my body... is not for you to toy with like that!
98: Father, are you watching? I can do it as long as I make up my mind!
99: I-I give up! Stop it already—!
100: My relationship with my brothers isn't that good. If nothing urgent comes up, we don't usually see each other...
Where's my service?! I'm so fed up waiting!

story.1: As a member of a prestigious house on Rodney Volcanoes, Léo von Narcis from the Narcis family believes that he was born superior, enjoying praise and support from those around him. Although he doesn't really know what the others think, at least he himself believes so.
story.2: Compared to his older brother and younger brother, Léo is quite a narcissistic person. He loves to flaunt his mane to others and flirts with people frequently, completely ignoring the awkward silence in the room with cringe-worthy lines. Although he often hosts parties on Rodney Volcanoes, his flirting skills always seem unimpressive.
story.3: Léo has huge mood swings. He easily gets carried away with pride after being praised and quickly falls into despair when criticized. However, anyone who knows Léo understands that he's just someone who appears arrogant on the surface but, in reality, is actually simple and a bit of a failure deep down. While he sometimes puts on a lofty attitude, he doesn't have any ill intentions and often ends up getting slapped in the face by karma.
story.4: Lion Beastfolks are with both high status and great physical abilities. Léo, on the contrary, due to his prestigious background, has never experienced much hardship and can easily be overpowered. However, every time he faces danger, he is always able to escape unscathed, relying on his good luck.

1.text: Oh...is this the trick you mentioned?
Oh! Haah... What's this warm, tingly feeling? Eek~! It's happening again!
I want to tease this lion... This surely isn't my fault, right?

2.text: What? You're saying the curves of my hips look... captivating?
You've got good taste. I'm quite confident with my body's contours.
Just a few compliments and he's already on cloud nine.

3.text: He seems to be enjoying himself quite a lot, hmph...

1.text: These little tricks? They're nowhere near enough for me.
Stupid lion, I'll make sure you can't even speak later.

2.text: I thought he was just a sickly cat, but his roar was surely deafening...

3.text: Is that all? My schedule is tight. I'm leaving.
You're a big fat cat who's too hard to please!
